title: peltopus santoensis
intro: Peltopus santoensis is a plant species native to New Caledonia, belonging to the family Fabaceae, and is also known as the "Santo bean" or "Yam bean." It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Peltopus santoensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve blood lipid profiles, and reduce the risk of cardiovascular disease. The plant can be prepared as a decoction or tea, or used in capsule form, to make use of its medicinal properties and health benefits.
